text:
My favorite YTP creator making a poop of my favorite band. When you did the brief portion of "Rhinestone Eyes" for your Pooping the Charts 2011 Extras Edition, I thought "Damn. Well he did Gorillaz already..." and I never got my hopes up again after.

But this. This is a masterpiece. As an aspiring video editor myself, I don't think I've seen anything that had me quite nearly inspired and outright struck by awe as this, and I wish more people understood the amount of time, effort, and practice that it takes to make a decent video, let alone something as intricate as a good YTP. I don't know if it's the original material and my love for the Gorillaz, or if it's your natural talent in taking an existing piece of art, flipping it on it's head, and making something phenomenally unique and wonderful, able to stand on its own two legs.

Shameless simping/fanboying aside, this was an amazing YTP, one of my favorites (if not my #1 favorite), and I will definitely be keeping this on rotation. Thank you for all that you do, cs.
